title: ploiarium pulcherrimum
intro: Ploiarium pulcherrimum, also known as the 'Hairy Bristle Club Moss', is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ploiarium pulcherrimum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ploiarium pulcherrimum include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments for external use.
